hero.title: Three Inquisitive Kids: Find passion in learning!
hero.subtitle: A place for all to learn and grow.
about.heading: About Us
about.groupParagraph1: is made up of three siblings: Kangbin, Karen, and Kalie.
about.groupParagraph2: Together they formed the Three Inquisitive Kids YouTube channel and created this website. In the Inquisitive Kids youtube channel, you can find all sorts of interesting math videos including math olympiad, Chinese middle school math courses, and fun word problems.
portfolio.heading: Our Works
portfolio.subheading: Have a look at our works!
team.heading: We Three Together
team.kangbin.name: Kangbin Jia
team.karen.name: Karen Jia
team.kalie.name: Kalie Jia
team.kangbin.tagline: Loves tackling tricky word problems and building things with code.
team.karen.tagline: Enjoys explaining linear functions and that "aha" moment when it clicks.
team.kalie.tagline: Fan of number puzzles like cryptarithms — the trickier, the better.
resources.heading: Useful Resources
resources.worksheets.heading: Math Worksheets
resources.worksheets.description: Translated precisely with explanations, answer keys, and solutions. Challenges from all types of levels of students.
resources.worksheets.grade6.title: 6th Grade Math worksheets
resources.worksheets.grade6.body: A fractions calculation worksheet for 6th grade, translated from Chinese middle-school materials with full solutions.
resources.worksheets.grade7.title: 7th Grade Math Worksheets
resources.worksheets.grade7.body: A 7th grade final exam paper covering a full semester of middle-school math, translated with solutions.
resources.worksheets.grade8.title: 8th Grade Math Worksheets
resources.worksheets.grade8.body: 8th grade worksheets are being translated and checked for accuracy — check back soon.
resources.worksheets.grade9.title: 9th Grade Math Worksheets
resources.worksheets.grade9.body: 9th grade worksheets are being translated and checked for accuracy — check back soon.
resources.lessons.heading: Free lessons online
resources.lessons.description: Go to our Youtube channel where you can find detailed, Chinese middle school math lessons that match with our worksheets. It is translated carefully and we hope to create a love of math for our viewers.
resources.lessons.grade6.title: Math lesson for 6th grade
resources.lessons.grade6.body: Video lessons walking through 6th grade math topics step by step, matched to our worksheet library. Watch on our
resources.lessons.grade7.title: Math lesson for 7th grade
resources.lessons.grade7.body: Video lessons covering 7th grade topics including linear functions and word problems. Watch on our
resources.lessons.grade8.title: Math lesson for 8th grade
resources.lessons.grade8.body: 8th grade video lessons are in production — subscribe to our channel to be notified when they're live.
resources.competition.heading: Math Competition Practice Sheets Collection
resources.competition.description: Practice sheets for popular math competitions, organized by contest.
resources.competition.moems.title: MOEMS: Math Olympiads for Elementary and Middle Schools
resources.competition.moems.body: Practice sheets for MOEMS (Math Olympiads for Elementary and Middle Schools) are currently in preparation.
resources.competition.amc8.title: AMC-8
resources.competition.amc8.body: AMC-8 practice sheets are currently in preparation.
resources.competition.amc10.title: AMC-10
resources.competition.amc10.body: AMC-10 practice sheets are currently in preparation.
resources.workbooks.heading: Workbook
resources.workbooks.description: A series of books that collect worksheets and exam papers used in China.
resources.workbooks.grade7.title: 7th grade math workbook
resources.workbooks.grade7.body: The 7th grade workbook is being compiled from our translated exam collection.
resources.workbooks.grade8.title: 8th grade math workbook
resources.workbooks.grade8.body: The 8th grade workbook is planned for a future release.
resources.workbooks.grade9.title: 9th grade math workbook
resources.workbooks.grade9.body: The 9th grade workbook is planned for a future release.
